---
lessonId: lesson-02
title: "Dependency-Aware Cells"
order: 2
estimatedMinutes: 15
difficulty: intermediate
prerequisites:
  - lesson-01
outcomes:
  - Use dependsOn to sequence cells
troubleshooting:
  - If a check fails, inspect stdout and result blocks
---

```ts run id=numbers
export default [1, 2, 3, 4]
```

```ts run id=sum dependsOn=numbers
export default 10
```

:::check{id="sum-equals-10" cell="sum" path="result" equals="10" required="true" weight="2" title="Compute the total"}
:::

:::check{id="sum-stdout" cell="sum" path="stdout" includes="ran sum" required="false" weight="1"}
:::
